checks.finding: All decisions in design.md carry inline rationale: Bash/PowerShell twin tech justified by cross-host determinism (frontend-spec.md Technology Stack Rationale column); the two precheck .ps1 ports follow the established twin idiom precedent (design.md:340-345); OQ-3's seed category set adopted-and-closed with explicit deferral rationale (design.md:430-432); the CANONICAL_BASENAMES and downstream-review-precheck-parity non-extensions each carry an explicit 'Decided NO' + reasoning (design.md:446-464). No bare 'we will use X' without a because/since/following clause.

design.md Open Questions (lines 550-558) contains zero open entries: 'None blocking. All investigation.md OQ-1..OQ-7 are resolved above with design decisions,' plus the two additional design-time decisions stated as resolved. Check satisfied vacuously.

All 3 Assumptions entries (lines 536-548) valid: loop-driver.ps1 dispatch stability grounded in INV-016/INV-017 and re-verified line-by-line; grep-exit-code branching stability grounded in INV-012 (issue #127 landed); the line-citation staleness caveat is a reasonable self-aware footnote. investigation.md present, so the auto-Major trigger does not apply.

design.md Constraint Compliance table (lines 521-535) now has 10 rows (verified: 12 pipe-prefixed lines = header + separator + 10 data rows), resolving the round-1 Critical gap: all four CI-resilience constraints from requirements.md AC-018/Edge Cases now have explicit named rows citing INV-029 (bash 3.2 set -u empty-array), INV-030 (macOS pwd -P normalization), INV-031 (Windows jq CRLF stripping, explicit non-use declaration), and INV-032 (validator capability-probe gating), each tagged AC-018/TEST-018. No other requirements.md constraint is left unaddressed.

No other numeric performance requirement exists.

Deployment / CI Plan (lines 509-519) states the target (no runtime deployment; suites join the existing 3-OS matrix), the CI changes (two suite-array entries; no new steps for the .ps1 ports thanks to existence-guard dispatch), and rollback (per-item reviewed revert). Feature flags and migration order correctly absent.
Data Plan states Existing Data Affected: none / Migration Strategy: none — only a new committed fixture directory and mktemp-scoped synthetic copies. PASS per the no-data-changes rule.

External Integrations states None (lines 503-507), independently enforced by TEST-004's grep self-check that no new file invokes gh (AC-004; security-spec.md B4). gh/GitHub is the only external system named anywhere and is declared categorically unreachable by construction.

Every Components-table component traces to a requirements REQ/T-ID (REQ-001..REQ-005 mapping verified; CHANGED_FILES.txt is fixture-manifest support for AC-008, not a new feature). Every Goal and User Story has a corresponding design element. No under- or over-scoped gap found.

High-risk surfaces each have a concrete named verification path: security-spec.md's STRIDE table names TEST-013/TEST-016 for the weakened-precheck-port risk, TEST-005 for WFI-audit reference-check drift, TEST-002 for broken CHECK wiring, and TEST-004 for gh-reaches-GitHub — each cross-referenced to acceptance-tests.md TEST-IDs and design.md sections.
